description.p: Either magically or by the will of some powerful entity, you have avoided death, or been given new life after you perished. This affects you in the following ways

ul.li: Your creature type is now Aberration or Undead (DM discretion)
You don't gain the benefits of traditional healing potions; you need to make special concoctions which you know how to brew
You don't need food, air or water to live

You need to ingest calcium-rich consumables to maintain your body, or your flesh will noticeably rot away and give off a foul stench. After 5 days, you'll start to rot and any creature standing within 10 feet of you will notice your smell; at 10 days this increases to 20 feet and your flesh will fall off your bones. If you go 3 months like this, you'll become a full skeleton

sheet.description: You are an Aberration/Undead. You need to brew your own special healing potions. You don't need food, air or water, but need to ingest calcium; more than 5/10 days without it and you'll give off a foul stench in a 10/20 foot radius, and your flesh will noticeably fall off. 3 months of this and you'll have only your bones
